sectionTitle: Technology and Life | 科技與生活

items.en: to perceive keenly; gain insight into

samples.meaning: discern; see clearly; have an insight into
samples.pinyin: wǒ néng dòngchá dào tā de yìtú.
samples.en: I can perceive his intentions.
samples.vi: Tôi có thể thấy rõ ý đồ của anh ấy.

samples.meaning: discern; see clearly; have an insight into
samples.pinyin: wǒmen dòngchále tā de xīnqíng.
samples.en: We perceived his feelings.

samples.meaning: to do sth relentlessly; to persevere; to make unflagging effort
samples.sentence: 成功的秘/祕訣在於鍥而不捨。
samples.pinyin: chénggōng de mìjué zàiyú qiè'érbùshě.
samples.en: The secret of success is patience.
samples.vi: Bí quyết thành công là kiên nhẫn.

samples.meaning: to do sth relentlessly; to persevere; to make unflagging effort
samples.sentence: 他鍥而不捨地追求夢想。
samples.pinyin: tā qiè'érbùshě de zhuīqiú mèngxiǎng.
samples.en: He pursued his dream relentlessly.
samples.vi: Anh kiên nhẫn theo đuổi ước mơ.

samples.pinyin: tā yòng jīngyán tiáowèi càiyáo.
samples.en: She seasons the dishes with refined salt.

samples.pinyin: zhège cài xūyào jiārù jīngyán.
samples.en: This dish requires the addition of refined salt.

samples.pinyin: yǔ bǎ yīfu líndé jīngshī.
samples.en: The rain soaked his clothes through.

samples.pinyin: nà bù diànyǐng jīngxīn zhìzuò.
samples.en: That movie was carefully made.

samples.meaning: start; initiate; found; pioneer; set up
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào kāi chuàngxīn móshì.
samples.en: We are going to create a new model.
samples.vi: Chúng ta phải tạo ra mô hình mới.

samples.meaning: start; initiate; found; pioneer; set up
samples.pinyin: tā yǐ kāi chuàngxīn de chǎnpǐn xiàn.
samples.en: He has created a new product line.
samples.vi: Anh ấy đã mở ra dòng sản phẩm mới.

samples.pinyin: zhè cì gǎibiàn shì qìjī.
samples.en: This change is a turning point.

samples.pinyin: zhè chǎng bǐsài shì guānjiàn qìjī.
samples.en: This match is a key opportunity.

samples.meaning: not sure; may not; not necessarily
samples.sentence: 他們未必會來參加會議。
samples.pinyin: tāmen wèibì huì lái cānjiā huìyì.
samples.en: They may not necessarily come to the meeting.

samples.meaning: not sure; may not; not necessarily
samples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì wèibì rú nǐ suǒ xiǎng.
samples.en: This matter may not be as you think.

items.en: to proceed from; to start from

samples.meaning: set out; start off; leave; depart
samples.pinyin: wǒmen míngtiān zǎoshang chūfā.
samples.en: We will set off tomorrow morning.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ xuất phát vào sáng mai.

samples.meaning: set out; start off; leave; depart
samples.pinyin: tā yǐjīng chūfā qù jīchǎng.
samples.en: She has already departed for the airport.
samples.vi: Cô ấy đã xuất phát đến sân bay.

samples.pinyin: tā de qíngkuàng hěn tèshū.
samples.en: His situation is very special.

samples.sentence: 我們要給予特殊的關心。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào jǐyǔ tèshū de guānxīn.
samples.en: We must take particular care.
samples.vi: Chúng ta phải dành sự quan tâm đặc biệt.

samples.pinyin: guǎngchǎng shàng yǒuyī dàqún rén.

samples.sentence: 這座城市有許多樓群/羣。
samples.pinyin: zhè zuò chéngshì yǒu xǔduō lóu qún.
samples.en: This city has many building complexes.

samples.meaning: [for people or animals] herd; flock; group
samples.sentence: 一群/羣人在公園裡/裏跳舞。
samples.pinyin: yīqún rén zài gōngyuán lǐ tiàowǔ.
samples.en: A group of people is dancing in the park.

samples.meaning: [for people or animals] herd; flock; group
samples.pinyin: yīqún niǎo fēiguò tiānkōng.
samples.en: A flock of birds flew across the sky.

samples.pinyin: tā cóngxiǎo jiù bólǎn qún shū.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng qù nàxiē qúndǎo lǚxíng.
samples.en: I want to travel to those archipelagos.

samples.meaning: suddenly be inspired to do something; whims
samples.sentence: 我突髮/發奇想開了個店。
samples.pinyin: Wǒ tū fā qí xiǎng kāi le gè diàn.
samples.en: I suddenly had the idea to open a shop.

samples.pinyin: wǒ tū fā qí xiǎng mǎi le huā
samples.en: I suddenly thought of buying flowers.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen xūyào lǐjiě zhège yuánlǐ.

samples.sentence: 這個原理在科學中很重要。
samples.pinyin: zhège yuánlǐ zài kēxué zhōng hěn zhòngyào.
samples.en: This principle is very important in science.

samples.pinyin: zhōngyī shī zhèngzài yánzhì yàogāo.

samples.pinyin: yī shī chuán xià le gǔ fāng zi
samples.en: The physician passed down an ancient formula.

samples.pinyin: tāmen zhōngyú juédìng pèiduì.

samples.pinyin: tā yǔ pèi xiāngqīn xiāng'ài.
samples.en: He and she are a perfect match and love each other deeply.

samples.pinyin: tāmen shì hěn hǎo de pèi.

samples.pinyin: tā de pǐnzhì bù pèidāng lǎoshī.
samples.en: His character is not fit to be a teacher.

samples.sentence: 他配做這個職位的經理。
samples.pinyin: tā pèi zuò zhège zhíwèi de jīnglǐ.
samples.en: He is qualified to be the manager of this position.

samples.pinyin: zhè yīfu hé nǐ xìnggé hěn pèi.
samples.en: These clothes match your personality well.

samples.pinyin: xīn jiājù hé jiù zhuāngshì hěn pèi.
samples.en: The new furniture matches the old decorations well.

samples.pinyin: tā dàizhe yī fù lǎo guāng yǎnjìng.

samples.pinyin: méiyǒu yǎnjìng wǒ kàn bù qīngchu.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen liǎng gèrén sì mù xiāngduì.

samples.pinyin: suǒ xū jīn'é xiāngduì jiào xiǎo.

samples.pinyin: qióngkùn liáodǎo rěnjī ái'è

samples.pinyin: tā chénggōng de wánchéngle rènwù.

samples.pinyin: tā zhèngzài nǔlì wánchéng rènwù.

samples.pinyin: wǒ gūjì nà xiàng sǔnshī dá 8000 yuán.

samples.pinyin: zhè cì lǚxíng de huāfèi gūjì bù huì shǎo.

samples.sentence: 這個工具是他髮/發明的。
samples.pinyin: zhège gōngjù shì tā fāmíng de.

samples.pinyin: zhège fāmíng hěn yǒuyòng.
samples.en: This invention is very useful.
samples.vi: Phát minh này rất hữu ích.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān zhège fāmíng.
samples.en: I like this invention.

items.en: by oneself; of one's own accord

samples.sentence: 他自行決定了這個問題。
samples.pinyin: tā zìxíng juédìngle zhège wèntí.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen zìxíng jiějuéle wèntí.
samples.en: We solved the problem by ourselves.

items.en: to be from; to come from

samples.meaning: come from; originate from; stem from
samples.pinyin: zhè jù huà chūzì yī běn shū.
samples.en: This sentence comes from a book.

samples.pinyin: yīliáo yíqì yuè lái yuè xiānjìn.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen xūyào jiǎozhèng zìjǐ de xīntài.

samples.pinyin: tā de shìlì rìjiàn shuāituì.

items.en: supply cannot keep up with demand

samples.meaning: The supply is not adequate to the demand.; Demand exceeds supply.; Supply falls short of demand.; Supply fails to meet the demand.; The supply does not meet the demand.; The demand outstrips the supply.; The supply can hardly keep pace (up) with the demand.; The supply cannot keep pace with the increasing demand.; The supply is far from meeting the crying demand of the public.; The supply is unable to meet the demand.
samples.pinyin: zhèxiē huòwù gōng bù yìngqiú.
samples.en: The demand for these goods exceeds the supply.

samples.meaning: Supply falls short of demand. or Demand exceeds supply.

samples.pinyin: yì qíng qī jiān kǒu zhào gōng bù yìng qiú
samples.en: Masks were in short supply during the pandemic.

samples.sentence: 他為國傢貢獻了很多力量。

samples.sentence: 我們應該貢獻自己的經驗。

samples.pinyin: tā de gòngxiàn dédàole rènkě.

samples.pinyin: xuéxí rènzhēn, cóng'ér jìnbù.
